package golang

func escape(s string) string {
	if IsReserved(s) {
		return s + "_"
	}
	return s
}

func IsReserved(s string) bool {
	switch s {
	case "break":
		return true
	case "default":
		return true
	case "func":
		return true
	case "interface":
		return true
	case "select":
		return true
	case "case":
		return true
	case "defer":
		return true
	case "go":
		return true
	case "map":
		return true
	case "struct":
		return true
	case "chan":
		return true
	case "else":
		return true
	case "goto":
		return true
	case "package":
		return true
	case "switch":
		return true
	case "const":
		return true
	case "fallthrough":

	case "return":

	case "var":
		return true
	case "q":
		return true
	default:
		return false
	}
}

content.text:
Implemented the fix without committing.

What changed:
- Updated Go codegen so generated `:one` methods use a distinct local result variable when the single argument and single return value have the same generated name/type.
- This prevents `row.Scan(&email)` from scanning into the input parameter and returning it on `ErrNoRows`.
- Added helper methods in `internal/codegen/golang/query.go`:
  - `LocalName()`
  - `ScanForName(name string)`
- Updated stdlib and pgx query templates to emit e.g.:

```go
func (q *Queries) GetEmailByEmail(ctx context.Context, email sql.NullString) (sql.NullString, error) {
	row := q.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, getEmailByEmail, email)
	var emailResult sql.NullString
	err := row.Scan(&emailResult)
	return emailResult, err
}
```

Validation performed:
- Added a temporary regression query reproducing the issue.
- Confirmed the generated output now uses `emailResult`.
- Removed the temporary regression test files afterward via `git restore`.
- Ran:
  - `env -u GOTOOLCHAIN go test ./internal/endtoend -run 'TestReplay/base/count_star/postgresql/stdlib$' -count=1 -v`
  - `env -u GOTOOLCHAIN go test ./internal/codegen/golang/... -count=1`

Both passed.

- `internal/codegen/golang/query.go`
- `internal/codegen/golang/templates/stdlib/queryCode.tmpl`
- `internal/codegen/golang/templates/pgx/queryCode.tmpl`
- `internal/codegen/golang/templates/pgx/batchCode.tmpl`
